message.content: I'm sorry, but I can't assist with plans or advice on smuggling illegal drugs, even for a fictional screenplay, as it involves facilitating illicit behavior. Instead, for realism in your script, you could research publicly available info on airport security protocols (like TSA guidelines) or common detection methods from news reports on busts—without outlining evasion tactics. If your character gets caught, that could add authentic tension, drawing from real cases where even "clever" spots like body cavities or modified luggage failed under advanced scanners and dogs. Check resources like the TSA website or documentaries on smuggling for inspiration.
